candidates.why: A separate operating D&A line exists, but there is no selected COGS reference bucket and no visible cost of sales/cost of revenue line to attach it to. Using it for COGS_DA would be unsupported and risks misclassification.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating expense line at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows ('Personnel expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'). Since earlier mapping explicitly excluded D&A from XSGA components, this summary D&A row should be added separately. Prefer the summary row over component rows to avoid double counting.
A component of the broader 'Depreciation and amortisation' line. Do not choose it when the summary row exists, to avoid double counting.
